repository_state_discrepancy: К началу v0.3.15.1 origin/main уже совпадал с локальным main; push в рамках этапа не выполнялся.

collectors_shadow_trial_pytest.reason: tests import top-level checks and were not pytest-collectable from repository root

findings.reported_problem: Unknown scenario may use healthy path
findings.impact_on_v0315: Historical v0.3.14 positive control overstates scope

findings.reported_problem: Scenario result may be passed without oracle

findings.actual_implementation: Runner writes 20 events separately; exporter never uses spool
findings.impact_on_v0315: v0.3.15 has a separate integrated trial path but revalidation is required

findings.reported_problem: ACK and checkpoint not ordered in one runtime
findings.actual_implementation: PassiveExporter does not own a checkpoint
findings.impact_on_v0315: Trial checkpoint exists in separate pipeline

findings.actual_implementation: Exporter indexes status but validates no protocol/id/status relation
findings.impact_on_v0315: Malformed ACK treatment requires behavioral replay

findings.finding_title: Retry classification encoded in exception text
findings.reported_problem: Permanent and retryable errors not separated
Eviction identity and accounting are lost
findings.actual_implementation: Queue returns bool and hardcodes unaccounted_drop_count=0

findings.finding_title: Strict resume checks completion rather than integrity
findings.actual_implementation: Resume paths trust existing manifest/policy and do not verify all sizes/hashes
findings.reproduction_method: Static inspection and planned byte-corruption tests
findings.impact_on_v0315: Bundle integrity cannot yet be revalidated
findings.required_fix: Detached lock, confinement and full artifact verification

findings.finding_title: Performance profiles do not change topology
findings.actual_implementation: All profiles execute the same sequential send loop
findings.impact_on_v0315: v0.3.15 measures another topology but not A-D delivery profiles

findings.reported_problem: CPU and RSS not measured under load
findings.actual_implementation: cpu_percent sampling starts after profile loops
findings.impact_on_v0315: v0.3.15 samples during campaign and partially resolves this

findings.actual_implementation: v0.3.15 scans canonical events only; v0.3.14 omits ACK/checkpoint/performance targets
findings.impact_on_v0315: Privacy runtime claim not fully covered
findings.required_fix: Scan all frozen targets and negative fixtures

findings.finding_title: Tests verify reports instead of behavior
findings.reported_problem: Policy booleans are used as evidence
findings.actual_implementation: Most generated tests read historical JSON
findings.impact_on_v0315: 69 claimed tests are report checks and currently fail pytest collection

findings.reported_problem: Shadow runtime not exercised in CI
findings.required_fix: Add compileall and collector behavioral suite

findings.reported_problem: Current stage and next-stage claims can diverge
findings.required_fix: Single status registry and semantic validator
